skill.core.armorer.description.advanced:
{Advanced Armorer}

Reduces 10% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 25 rounds
skill.core.armorer.description.basic:
{Basic Armorer}

Reduces 5% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 10 rounds
skill.core.armorer.description.expert:
{Expert Armorer}

Reduces 15% physical damage and casts Stone Skin at battle opening for 50 rounds
